title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Office Parks REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Office Parks REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
